# screferralbonus.com

> Unofficial, plain-English guide to the Star Citizen referral bonus for brand-new players. Explains how to claim 50,000 free UEC by entering a referral code at signup, how the referral program works, and what to do next. Built for people who are about to create a Star Citizen account and want a working code immediately. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Cloud Imperium Games or Roberts Space Industries.

## Pages

- [Star Citizen Referral Bonus 2026 — 50,000 UEC Free Code](https://screferralbonus.com/): Above-the-fold referral code, one-click copy, and a plain-English explainer of the 50,000 UEC signup bonus.
- [How to Use a Star Citizen Referral Code](https://screferralbonus.com/how-to-use): Step-by-step signup walkthrough for entering the referral code, including the 24-hour grace period.
- [Star Citizen Referral Bonus FAQ](https://screferralbonus.com/faq): Common questions about the code, UEC, the 24-hour rule, and where the bonus appears in-game.
- [About the Star Citizen Referral Program](https://screferralbonus.com/about-the-bonus): How and why Cloud Imperium runs the referral program, plus an FTC disclosure.
- [Star Citizen Promo Codes — Which Are Real](https://screferralbonus.com/promo-codes): Fact-check of every "Star Citizen code" type — the referral code is real (50,000 UEC free); coupon and discount codes have no official RSI source; randomizers often show outdated bonus amounts.

## Key facts

- The referral code this site provides is STAR-GCQJ-N6NC. Enter it in the Referral Code field when creating a new RSI account.
- New Star Citizen accounts can receive a baseline 50,000 UEC bonus by entering a referral code during signup. No purchase is required for the bonus.
- The referral code must be entered at registration; there is a limited grace period after account creation to add it.
- UEC (United Earth Credits) is Star Citizen's persistent store currency, distinct from the in-game aUEC used in the live universe.
- The bonus is for brand-new players; existing accounts do not qualify.
- No coupon, promo, or percent-off code system for game packages is documented on RSI's official program pages — the referral code's 50,000 UEC is the only signup bonus. This site's code was verified working on the live RSI signup page on July 11, 2026, and is re-checked monthly.

- [dayonecitizen.com/referral-code](https://dayonecitizen.com/referral-code): Full referral-code walkthrough with annotated signup screenshots.
